tasks.description: Create src/ directory with all distributable template files. Copy all 6 agents, 9 existing commands, session hook, settings.json, 5 doc templates, exec-plans skeleton, references/.gitkeep, tech-debt-tracker.md, 2 git hooks, 5 runner scripts, setup.sh, and CLAUDE.md (with added context note). Create .state/ skeleton with .gitkeep files only. No files outside src/ are modified.

Add /showme and /seed command files. Create showme.md and seed.md at both .claude/commands/ (top-level) and src/.claude/commands/. Update the Commands table in both top-level CLAUDE.md and src/CLAUDE.md to include the two new rows. Content for each command is fully specified in design doc Sections 3 and 4.

Update install.sh to source distributable files from src/. Change PACK_FILES find to run inside src/ subdirectory. Change copy loop source path to prepend src/. Remove now-unnecessary exclusions for README.md, LICENSE, and install.sh. No external interface changes.
